raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The AI Copyright Transparency Act aims to increase transparency around the use of copyrighted materials to train generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) systems and models.",
    "The proposed legislation requires GenAI developers to inform copyright owners when their materials are included in GenAI training datasets.",
    "Developers often use copyrighted materials to train new GenAI models without crediting or compensating the owners of those materials.",
    "Copyright owners currently have no way of knowing whether specific materials have been used to train a particular model.",
    "The AI Copyright Transparency Act would give copyright holders the ability to take action against those who use their copyrighted materials without their permission.",
    "The Act requires developers to provide copyright owners with lists of copyrighted materials used to train GenAI systems and models.",
    "The Act requires developers to establish a publicly accessible mechanism allowing copyright owners to submit requests for information.",
    "The Act authorizes copyright owners to bring civil actions against developers who fail to provide required information.",
    "Thousands of illustrators have found their works used to train GenAI datasets without consent or any form of credit or compensation.",
    "Vast quantities of data are routinely and indiscriminately scraped from across the internet to train GenAI systems and models.",
    "There is a need for transparency in the use of copyrighted materials in GenAI training."
  ]
}
```
